title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Tutor and Clerk Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has recently released the official notification for the recruitment of 02 Tutor and Clerk Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in BAMS, BHMS, BUMS, BDS, or any degree can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can atten...
